description_long: This is a vintage Royal typewriter with a dark brown, almost black, metallic body and gold accents. The front features a prominent 'Royal Typewriter Company' label, flanked by the number 5 on each side, and a full set of round, white keys with black lettering. The top section includes a gold carriage return lever, a paper holder with the 'ROYAL' logo, and two black knobs on either side for adjusting the paper feed. The sides display the 'ROYAL' logo in gold, and the rear has a gold mechanism and a label indicating patent protection. The typewriter sits on four short cylindrical feet and has visible ribbon spools and a classic mechanical design. Its overall appearance is robust, with a mix of glossy and matte finishes, and it exudes a sense of historical craftsmanship.
description: A vintage Royal typewriter with a dark metallic body, gold accents, and round white keys, featuring prominent branding and classic mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, 'Royal Typewriter Company' label, and the number 5 on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'ROYAL' logo, the side profile of the keys, and the gold carriage mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gold mechanical components, rear label, and the back of the paper holder.
description_view_3: Right side view with the 'ROYAL' logo, side profile of the keys, and visible ribbon spools.
attribute_key_layout: Typewriter full layout (non-QWERTY, classic typewriter arrangement)
